name: Healthcare Optimizer for Medication Reconciliation
description: Healthcare Optimizer for Medication Reconciliation monitors claims history and harmonizes problem lists; applies decision gates and observability; orchestrates via EHR to reduce LOS.

steps.name: Case Intake
steps.description: Collect, validate and normalize device telemetry from EHR; attach a runId and timestamp for traceability.

steps.name: Plan
steps.description: Execute plan phase for the ReAct pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Act
steps.description: Execute act phase for the ReAct pattern: persist interim state, enforce guardrails, and emit structured JSON results.

steps.name: Plan Drafting
steps.description: Plan Drafting across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Risk Scoring
steps.description: Risk Scoring across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Intervention
steps.description: Intervention across joined datasets; branch on thresholds using decision gates; write metrics (success/error counts) for observability.

steps.name: Outcome Measurement
steps.description: Assemble final payload with status, artifacts, KPIs and audit trail; store to CDI; return response JSON for the client.
